name: chatgpt-dom-boost
description: Local DOM virtualizer for long ChatGPT conversations.

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist && cp src/styles.css dist/styles.css && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.pack:xpi: pnpm build && web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.release:firefox: rm -rf artifacts && pnpm build && pnpm lint:ext && web-ext sign --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir artifacts --channel unlisted --api-key "$AMO_JWT_ISSUER" --api-secret "$AMO_JWT_SECRET"
